mechanism_narrative: Persistently near-zero FEDFUNDS (currently 0.09%) suppresses the risk-free discount rate applied to equity cash flows, incentivizing sustained rotation into risk assets and producing positive SPX returns over a quarterly horizon as long as policy remains accommodative.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns during periods of FEDFUNDS < 0.25% are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in UNRATE of at least 0.2 percentage points over a trailing 3-month window signals improving labor market conditions, which boosts consumer confidence and spending capacity, driving positive SPX returns over the following 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls by >= 0.2 percentage points over trailing 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 7.3% and declining from post-GFC peak
failure_condition: Triggered instances show a forward 20-day positive-return win rate below 55% or Rank IC below 0.03 across a 3-year rolling walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month acceleration in RSAFS (retail sales) and HOUST (housing starts) reflects broad-based consumer and housing demand expansion that jointly signals stronger aggregate demand than either series alone, leading to positive SPX returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS MoM growth > 0 AND HOUST MoM growth > 0 simultaneously
regime_hint: any regime with synchronized consumer and housing expansion
failure_condition: The joint RSAFS+HOUST signal fails to outperform either univariate signal in Rank IC by a margin greater than 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: In an early-cycle recovery regime characterized by near-zero FEDFUNDS and gradually declining but still elevated UNRATE, acceleration in INDPRO signals reflation and improving corporate earnings prospects, driving positive SPX returns over the next quarter; this relationship weakens or reverses in late-cycle regimes where INDPRO acceleration instead raises rate-hike fears.
regime_hint: early-cycle post-recession recovery with near-zero policy rate
failure_condition: During the identified early-cycle regime, SPX 60-day forward returns conditional on rising INDPRO are not significantly different from the unconditional baseline (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation exceeds 2.5% while FEDFUNDS remains below 0.25%, realized negative real interest rates push investors toward equities as an inflation hedge, producing short-term positive momentum in SPX over the following week.
regime_hint: negative real rate / financial repression regime
failure_condition: When triggered, 5-day forward SPX returns are not significantly positive (p > 0.05) or Rank IC drops below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Joint occurrence of positive month-over-month PAYEMS growth and a simultaneous decline in UNRATE confirms genuine labor-market strengthening rather than a statistical artifact of labor force exits, raising consumer income expectations and supporting SPX gains over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS MoM change > 0 AND UNRATE MoM change < 0
regime_hint: any regime with confirmed labor market tightening
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS+UNRATE signal's Rank IC is not measurably higher (by at least 0.02) than the PAYEMS-only signal over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarter-over-quarter growth in GDPC1 signals expanding aggregate output and corporate revenue growth, which predicts positive SPX returns over the subsequent quarter as earnings expectations adjust upward.
failure_condition: Rank IC between GDPC1 QoQ growth and 60-day forward SPX returns falls below 0.03 over any rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in INDPRO exceeding -0.5% signals an abrupt contraction in industrial production, foreshadowing weaker near-term corporate earnings and producing negative SPX returns over the following week as markets price in the slowdown.
failure_condition: Triggered instances of INDPRO decline > 0.5% show a negative-return win rate below 55% over a 3-year rolling walk-forward test, or Rank IC below 0.03.
